title: INNER JOIN gives the results of a CROSS JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test.foo (key_var int NOT NULL, value_var2 float DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test.bar (key_var int NOT NULL, value_var1 varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT f.key_var, f.value_var2, b.value_var1 FROM test.foo f INNER JOIN test.bar b ON f.key_var = b.key_var;
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN behaves like a CROSS JOIN
